tuning: E A D G B E

[Intro]
[ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]G5/F[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch] x2


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]              [ch]G5/F[/ch]           [ch]Csus2[/ch]
  Why drink the water from my hand?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]G5/F[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
Contagious as you think I   am[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]             [ch]G5/F[/ch]                [ch]Csus2[/ch]
  Just tilt my sun towards your domain[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]G5/F[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Your cup runneth over again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
  Don't scream about[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5/F[/ch]
  Don't think aloud[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                 [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]
  Turn your head now baby[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G/B[/ch]
Just spit me out[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
  Don't worry about[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5/F[/ch]
  Don't speak of doubt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                 [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]G/B[/ch]
Just spit me out[/tab]

[tab][ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]G5/F[/ch]           [ch]Csus2[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]G5/F[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Lost as you swear I   am[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]              [ch]G5/F[/ch]           [ch]Csus2[/ch]
  Don't throw away your basic needs,[/tab]
